name: Infected Ladybug

attacks.name: Bite
attacks.tell: It leans forward and snaps with a close-range bite.
attacks.howToAvoid: Block it from the front or step out of its short line before impact.
attacks.notes: Its basic option once it gets into range.

attacks.name: Side Slam
attacks.tell: It shifts sideways and slams its body to knock and stun you.
attacks.howToAvoid: Back away or dodge toward its rear as it starts turning.
attacks.notes: This is the normal ladybug slam, but it remains one of its hardest punish tools.

attacks.name: Back Buck
attacks.tell: If someone climbs onto its shell, it arches up and bucks backward.
attacks.howToAvoid: Get off immediately if you try to ride it or prepare to be thrown off.
attacks.notes: It shares this punishment with the normal ladybug.

attacks.name: Spore Bomb Volley
attacks.tell: It braces itself and launches four infected bombs in random directions.
attacks.howToAvoid: Do not stay still after the launch; avoid the impacts and move away from the delayed blasts.
attacks.notes: This is its signature move: the bombs can be inaccurate, but they are lethal if several land nearby.

description: An infected ladybug that patrols the Haze and turns the area into a minefield of explosive spores.
behavior: It wanders the Haze without a real route and attacks almost anything it sees. Its attacks carry far enough to reveal its presence from a distance.
interactionWithPlayer: It is extremely aggressive toward the player and can chase for a long time. It mixes normal ladybug body attacks with spore bombs that punish staying still.
interactionWithCreatures: It is hostile to almost every non-infected creature. Only other infected creatures tend to remain neutral until one accidentally harms the other.
strategy: Do not fight it as if it were a normal ladybug. Leave room to read the bomb volley, punish the bite and side slam, and avoid getting boxed in by overlapping blasts.
respawnInfo: 1 day. The Haze Lab specimen behaves like a sealed special encounter.

combatStats.attackDamageSummary:
Bite: 75
Side Hit: 100
Back Buck: 130
Spore Bombs: 90

specialTraits: It is immune to gas hazard. The Haze Lab specimen behaves almost like a mini-boss and can call infected adds on higher difficulties or with multiple players.
